world.title: Trump threatens Iran as his envoys head to Pak for 2nd round of talks
world.summary: Donald Trump announced that his special envoys, Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, will arrive in Islamabad for a second round of talks following unsuccessful negotiations with Iran. While diplomacy is being pursued, Trump has also issued a warning to Iran, threatening significant military action against its infrastructure if necessary. The situation remains tense as discussions continue.

world.title: origin men plead guilty in California; hired people for non
world.summary: Two Indian-origin men in California pleaded guilty to conspiracy related to H-1B visa fraud. They hired foreign nationals, falsely promising them jobs at the University of California. This scheme misled both the job seekers and the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS). The case highlights ongoing issues surrounding H-1B visa misuse and fraudulent employment practices.

world.title: ‘There will be consequences,’ India warns Iran after attack on 2 tankers in Hormuz
world.summary: India has expressed strong discontent to Iran after two Indian tankers were fired upon by the Iranian Navy near the Strait of Hormuz. New Delhi warned Tehran that such actions would have consequences. The incident is taken seriously, especially as an Iranian warship, IRIS Lavan, remains docked in Kochi, following the sinking of another Iranian vessel by a US submarine.

business.title: PM Modi’s Car At The Price Of Mahindra XUV 7XO!
business.summary: A bulletproof Toyota Fortuner is available for ₹29.75 lakh, comparable to the price of a Mahindra XUV 7XO. The Fortuner is popular among politicians, actors, and sports figures, often modified for enhanced security. While such modifications typically incur high costs, this particular listing offers an affordable option for those seeking a durable and secure vehicle.

business.title: PM Modi’s Car At The Price Of Mahindra XUV 7XO!
business.summary: A bulletproof Toyota Fortuner is available for ₹29.75 lakh, comparable to the price of a Mahindra XUV 7XO. The Fortuner is popular among politicians, actors, and sports figures, often modified for added protection. This specific model offers an unbreakable design, making it an appealing choice for those seeking security without excessive costs typically associated with armored vehicles.

business.title: Shriram Finance revises fixed deposit interest rates from 6 May - Check details here
business.summary: Shriram Finance has updated its fixed deposit interest rates, effective from 6 May 2026. This revision follows upgrades to the company's credit ratings by CARE Ratings, CRISIL Ratings, ICRA, and India Ratings. The new rates apply across various tenors, reflecting the improved financial standing of the Shriram Group flagship company, as announced in a recent release.

technology.title: iPhone 18 pro max set to launch alongside Apple first foldable? New cherry colour, specs, and expected upgrades revealed
technology.summary: Apple's iPhone 18 Pro Max is anticipated to launch soon, potentially alongside the company's first foldable device. Leaks suggest new color options, design modifications, and enhanced performance features. While Apple has not officially confirmed these details, speculation continues to grow regarding the upcoming flagship and its accompanying models, generating significant interest among consumers and tech enthusiasts alike.

technology.title: Pragmata becomes Capcom's top rated Steam game; 97% positive user rating
technology.summary: Pragmata has achieved a 97% positive user rating on Steam, making it one of Capcom's top-rated games. This success follows the popularity of Resident Evil Requiem, highlighting Capcom's strong gaming lineup in 2026. The game is recognized as one of Capcom's best new intellectual properties, reinforcing the company's reputation as a leading publisher in the industry.

technology.title: Weekly deals: vivo X300 Ultra arrives, X300 and X300 Pro on sale, iPhone Air also discounted
technology.summary: The vivo X300 Ultra and X300 Pro have launched in Europe, featuring optional photography kits. The X300 Ultra is expected to ship within a week. Additionally, the iPhone Air is currently available at a discounted price. The X300 Ultra is anticipated to be one of the leading camera phones of the year, with reviews underway.

sports.title: Riyan Parag form can spoil Rajasthan Royals’ good work; the franchise made a mistake with him
sports.summary: Riyan Parag's performance has been disappointing, scoring only 61 runs in six innings, raising concerns about his confidence and impact on the Rajasthan Royals. Despite the team winning four out of five matches and currently sitting third in the points table, Parag's struggles could undermine the franchise's success this season. Leadership issues may arise if his form does not improve.

sports.title: SRH Fan Performs Bizarre Act, Shivam Dube Departs Next Ball. Video Viral
sports.summary: A video from the IPL 2026 match between Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings has gone viral, showing a fan allegedly performing black magic from the stands at Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium. The incident gained attention as Shivam Dube, a player for Sunrisers Hyderabad, was dismissed on the very next ball after the fan's act.

sports.title: Shoriful lauds "healthy competition" among pacers after comeback
sports.summary: Bangladesh pacer Shoriful Islam expressed confidence following his return to the ODI setup, emphasizing his mental resilience and preparedness. He stated he is not troubled by his long absence from the team and is ready to perform when called upon. Shoriful also praised the "healthy competition" among the pacers, highlighting the positive environment within the squad.

health.title: World Liver Day: Can Using Too Much Painkillers, Supplements Cause Liver Damage?
health.summary: On World Liver Day, experts warn that excessive use of painkillers and dietary supplements can harm liver health. High doses or combining multiple supplements may lead to adverse effects. Many individuals seek quick fixes for ailments, relying on pain relief and immunity-boosting products. Awareness of the potential risks associated with overuse is crucial for maintaining liver function and overall health.

health.title: Can smart health devices detect heart attack before symptoms? Experts explain how AI enhanced wearables are changing healthcare
health.summary: Experts discuss the potential of smart health devices, such as smartwatches, to detect heart attacks before symptoms manifest. These AI-enhanced wearables monitor hidden warning signs, enabling early intervention and potentially preventing serious illnesses. The integration of advanced technology in healthcare aims to improve patient outcomes by providing timely alerts and fostering proactive health management.

health.title: Frequent Mouthwash Use May Increase Hypertension Risk: Experts
health.summary: Social media claims suggest that frequent mouthwash use may increase hypertension risk by eliminating beneficial oral bacteria crucial for cardiovascular health. Experts caution that while the message is striking, the relationship between mouthwash and blood pressure is complex. The mouth hosts diverse bacteria that contribute to overall health, indicating that mouthwash should not be discarded without further consideration.

science.title: Antiviral activity and chemical characterization of Egyptian Ziziphus spina-christi against human respiratory viruses
science.summary: A study investigated the antiviral properties of Ziziphus spina-christi against influenza H1N1, MERS-CoV, and SARS-CoV-2. Crude extracts from leaves and fruits showed significant antiviral activity, with IC50 values of 1.240 µg/ml for H1N1 and 7.397 µg/ml for SARS-CoV-2. Chemical analysis identified flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins as key compounds, suggesting potential for natural antiviral treatments.

science.title: NASA Reveals Rapid X-Ray Fading In Young Stars Could Favour Life-Hosting Planets
science.summary: NASA's research indicates that young stars, particularly those similar to the Sun, exhibit rapid fading in X-ray emissions, potentially increasing the likelihood of life-supporting planets. Utilizing data from the European Space Agency's Gaia satellite and the ROSAT mission, scientists discovered that these stars become quieter and dimmer in X-rays more quickly than previously thought, providing new insights into astrobiology.

science.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on April 19
science.summary: On April 19, the Moon is in the Waxing Crescent phase, marking its gradual reappearance after several days of darkness. Each night, the Moon will become increasingly illuminated from the right side, leading up to the Full Moon. This phase signifies the transition from darkness to light in the lunar cycle, offering a view of the Moon's growing visibility.

entertainment.title: Mrunal Thakur just proved a monochrome kurta can be a bigger power move than any red carpet gown
entertainment.summary: Mrunal Thakur showcased a monochrome kurta, highlighting its potential as a powerful fashion statement. The outfit blends maximalism and nostalgia, making it a standout choice for summer. Thakur's ethnic look emphasizes the versatility of kurtas, suggesting they can rival traditional red carpet gowns in impact. This fashion moment encourages a shift towards simpler, yet striking, summer attire.

entertainment.title: Dhurandhar 2 beats Pushpa 2 to become third-highest-grossing Indian film ever; can it beat Dangal to reach #1 | Analysis
entertainment.summary: Ranveer Singh's film "Dhurandhar The Revenge" has surpassed "Pushpa 2" at the box office, making it the third-highest-grossing Indian film ever. The film's success raises questions about its potential to challenge "Dangal" for the top spot. The analysis highlights the competitive landscape of Indian cinema and the significant box office milestones achieved by recent releases.

entertainment.title: Shruti Haasan Viral Video: Anger Justified or Overreaction?
entertainment.summary: Actress Shruti Haasan became the focus of a viral video following her strong reaction to paparazzi referring to her as "mumma" in Mumbai. The incident occurred as she exited a restaurant, prompting discussions about her response. The video has ignited a debate on social media regarding whether her anger was justified or an overreaction to the situation.
